description: Context-aware next-step suggestions in command output like git status hints — dim/italic footer hints after pretty output, suppressed in JSON/CSV/non-TTY/standup.

userStories.title: Suggestion engine: SuggestionContext + generate_suggestions()
userStories.description: Add a new module `src/suggestions.rs` containing a `SuggestionContext` struct and a pure `generate_suggestions(ctx: &SuggestionContext) -> Vec<String>` function. The function returns zero or more hint strings (command strings only, no formatting). The context captures everything needed to decide which hints to show: which command ran, current flags, whether summarize was used, whether the daemon is running, whether there was any activity, and whether LLM is configured. Pure function — no I/O, easily unit-testable.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/suggestions.rs` exists and is declared in `src/lib.rs`
`pub struct SuggestionContext` with fields: `command: SuggestionCommand`, `has_activity: bool`, `summarize_used: bool`, `daemon_running: bool`, `llm_configured: bool`, `format: OutputFormat`
`pub enum SuggestionCommand { Today, Week, Month, Standup }` with derive Debug/Clone/PartialEq
`pub fn generate_suggestions(ctx: &SuggestionContext) -> Vec<String>` is pure (no I/O, no side effects)
Function returns empty vec when `format != OutputFormat::Pretty` (machine-readable output)
Function returns empty vec when `summarize_used == true` (LLM output path)
Unit tests cover: empty when JSON, empty when summarize, at least 3 contextual hint combinations

userStories.title: Per-command suggestion rules
userStories.description: Implement the full ruleset inside `generate_suggestions()`. Rules for Today: if daemon not running → suggest `blackbox start`; if no activity → suggest `blackbox doctor`; if activity exists and !summarize_used and llm_configured → suggest `blackbox today --summarize`; if activity exists → suggest `blackbox live`. Rules for Week/Month: mirror Today rules substituting command name. Rules for Standup: no suggestions (standup is already a terminal output). Daemon-not-running hint always comes first when present.
acceptanceCriteria: Today + daemon not running → includes `blackbox start` hint
Today + daemon running + has activity + llm_configured → includes `blackbox today --summarize` hint
Today + daemon running + has activity → includes `blackbox live` hint
Today + daemon running + no activity → includes `blackbox doctor` hint (checks health)
Week + daemon running + has activity + llm_configured → includes `blackbox week --summarize` hint
Month + daemon running + has activity + llm_configured → includes `blackbox month --summarize` hint
Standup command → always returns empty vec (hints would duplicate what standup already shows)
Daemon-not-running hint is first in returned vec when present
No more than 3 hints returned for any single context (avoids noise)
Unit tests cover all 4 commands across running/stopped daemon and activity/no-activity combinations

userStories.title: Hint rendering: render_suggestions() in output.rs
userStories.description: Add `pub fn render_suggestions(hints: &[String]) -> String` to `src/output.rs`. Output format: a blank line, then each hint prefixed with `  hint: ` in dim+italic styling using the `colored` crate. Example: `  hint: try blackbox today --summarize for an AI summary`. Returns empty string when hints slice is empty. Must be a pure String-returning function so it is testable without TTY.
acceptanceCriteria: `pub fn render_suggestions(hints: &[String]) -> String` in `src/output.rs`
Returns `""` (empty string) when `hints` is empty
When hints present: output starts with a `\n` (blank separator line)
Each hint line formatted as `  hint: <hint_text>` with dim+italic via `colored`
Color/style applied with `.dimmed().italic()` on the full line string
Unit test: empty input → empty string
Unit test: one hint → contains `hint:` and the hint text
Unit test with `colored::control::set_override(false)` to strip ANSI for assertion

userStories.title: Wire suggestions into run_query (Today/Week/Month)
userStories.description: In `main.rs`, after `render_summary(&summary)` is called for pretty output, build a `SuggestionContext`, call `generate_suggestions`, and if any hints exist call `render_suggestions` and print the result to stderr (not stdout — keeps stdout clean for piping). Use `is_daemon_running` from `daemon.rs` to populate the `daemon_running` field. The `llm_configured` field is true when `config.llm_provider.is_some()`. Hints go to stderr so JSON/plain stdout pipelines are unaffected.
acceptanceCriteria: After `OutputFormat::Pretty` render in `run_query`, hints are computed and printed to stderr
`SuggestionContext::daemon_running` populated via `blackbox::daemon::is_daemon_running(&data_dir).unwrap_or(None).is_some()`
`SuggestionContext::llm_configured` = `config.llm_provider.is_some()`
`SuggestionContext::has_activity` = `summary.total_commits > 0 || summary.total_reviews > 0`
`SuggestionContext::format` = the resolved OutputFormat
Hints printed with `eprint!` (stderr), not `print!` (stdout)
When format is Json or Csv: `generate_suggestions` returns empty (no hints printed)
When `summarize == true`: `summarize_used` set to true → no hints printed
Integration test: `blackbox today` in a TTY-like test env produces hint lines on stderr
Integration test: `blackbox today --format json` stdout is valid JSON with no hint lines mixed in

userStories.title: Suppress hints in non-TTY (pipe/redirect)
userStories.description: Hints must never appear when stdout is not a TTY — users piping output into jq, scripts, or CI would be confused by dim text on stderr. Check `is_tty()` before printing hints. Additionally, `generate_suggestions` already guards on `format != Pretty`, but for extra safety: if `!is_tty()` the caller in `run_query` should skip hint generation entirely.
acceptanceCriteria: In `run_query`, hint generation is gated by `blackbox::output::is_tty()`
When `!is_tty()`: `generate_suggestions` is never called (short-circuit, no allocation)
When `is_tty()` and `format == Pretty` and `!summarize`: hints are generated and printed
Unit test for `generate_suggestions` still passes (pure function, not affected by TTY check)
Manual test note: pipe `blackbox today | cat` → no hint lines on stderr

userStories.title: Config opt-out: show_hints field
userStories.description: Add `show_hints: bool` (default true) to `Config` in `config.rs`. When `show_hints == false`, skip hint generation entirely. Users who find hints noisy can set `show_hints = false` in `~/.config/blackbox/config.toml`. Follow the existing `#[serde(default)]` pattern with a `fn default_show_hints() -> bool { true }` function.
acceptanceCriteria: `show_hints: bool` field added to `Config` struct in `src/config.rs`
`#[serde(default = "default_show_hints")]` attribute on the field
`fn default_show_hints() -> bool { true }` free function in `config.rs`
`Config::default()` sets `show_hints: true`
In `run_query` in `main.rs`: hint generation skipped when `!config.show_hints`
Existing tests that construct `Config` still compile (field has serde default so TOML tests unaffected; struct literal tests need `show_hints: true` added)
Unit test: Config deserialized from TOML without `show_hints` key → `show_hints == true`
Unit test: Config deserialized from TOML with `show_hints = false` → `show_hints == false`

userStories.title: Integration tests for hint suppression paths
userStories.description: Add integration tests in `tests/suggestions_test.rs` (unit) and `tests/cli_test.rs` (CLI) covering: (1) `generate_suggestions` returns no hints for Json/Csv format, (2) `generate_suggestions` returns no hints when summarize_used, (3) CLI: `blackbox today --format json` stdout is valid JSON with no hint contamination on stdout. Note: stderr hint presence in CLI tests is best-effort since assert_cmd stderr capture requires explicit setup.
acceptanceCriteria: `tests/suggestions_test.rs` exists with at least 6 unit tests for `generate_suggestions`
Test: format=Json → empty hints
Test: format=Csv → empty hints
Test: summarize_used=true → empty hints
Test: Today + daemon running + has_activity + llm_configured → vec len >= 1 and contains '--summarize'
Test: Today + daemon not running → vec[0] contains 'start'
Test: Today + daemon running + no activity → vec contains 'doctor'
CLI test: `blackbox today --format json` stdout is valid JSON (no hint text mixed in stdout)

userStories.title: Update README.md and AGENTS.md
userStories.description: Update project documentation to reflect new feature. README.md: add new command to Commands table if applicable, update feature descriptions. AGENTS.md: add new source files to Architecture tree, update Key Patterns if new patterns introduced.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md Commands table includes new command (if a CLI command was added)
README.md describes the new feature/capability
AGENTS.md Architecture src/ tree lists any new .rs files
AGENTS.md Key Dependencies updated if new crates added
userStories.notes: This must be the LAST story executed. Reference README.md and AGENTS.md in project root.
